notes: Logical two-leg XTI/XNG 11-to-10-month microscopic-momentum basket from approved card FAN-MICROMOM-2014_XTI_XNG_S01. Run on XTIUSD.DWX D1; at the first tradable bar of every broker month, calculate each leg's log return between the t-11 and t-10 completed-month boundaries, buy the higher-return leg, short the lower-return leg, and evaluate the package rather than standalone legs. Thesis/working-paper evidence quality, broad-futures-to-two-CFD narrowing, continuous-CFD basis, and sparse two-name ranking are binding Q02 falsification risks.
